name: Crunchy Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F.
Mix dry ingredients in a bowl. Cream together sugars, shortening, vanilla, and molasses in another bowl until smooth.
Combine the dry ingredients with the wet mixture until well incorporated. Add raisins, nuts (such as pecans), chocolate chips, or other desired add-ins; mix thoroughly.
Scoop tablespoon-sized portions of batter onto a greased cookie sheet, forming balls about 1 to 1½ inches in diameter.
Place the cookies in the oven and bake for 11-13 minutes. Lowering the temperature slightly allows for longer baking time without burning.
Remove from oven and let cool on a wire rack for a few minutes before serving. Enjoy!
